name: In Papa's Footsteps
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>雪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>沓</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぐつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の <ruby lang="jp"><rb>跡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あと</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>追</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>お</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>うひとつ またひとつ
name_jp_rom: Yukigutsu no Ato Ou Hitotsu Mata Hitotsu
name_jp_tl: Snow Boots, One Following their Tracks, and Another
desc: If a card(s) is sent to the GY, except "In Papa's Footsteps": Banish up to 5 cards from your GY, face-down, then if 7 or more of your cards are currently banished face-down, your opponent banishes as many cards as possible from their GY (max. 5) face-down.
eff: If a card(s) is sent to the GY, except "In Papa's Footsteps": Banish up to 5 cards from your GY, face-down, then if 7 or more of your cards are currently banished face-down, your opponent banishes as many cards as possible from their GY (max. 5) face-down.

action: Activates if other cards are sent to the Graveyard
banished: Makes the opponent banish from the Graveyard
